methodology.rationale: Higher weights for active engagement (replies, quotes) vs passive (likes)
methodology.normalization: Z-score followed by min-max to 0-1 scale

statistical_test.interpretation: Human-shared papers get significantly different engagement

key_findings: Human and bot-shared papers have significantly different engagement (p=0.0)
Top paper: "Swapping old immune cells in the brain with fresh ..." with 853 engagement
limitations: Sample limited to top 100 posts per source by engagement (selection bias toward high performers)
Composite weights are heuristic - not empirically calibrated
No control for post age (older posts may accumulate more engagement)
Same paper shared by multiple authors counted as separate posts
